mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TS_MA_HISTORY WHERE CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY HIS_SEQ DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TS_MA_HISTORY WHERE CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TS_MA_HISTORY ( HIS_ID, CONTRACT_NO, HIS_DT, HIS_TYPE_CD, HIS_SEQ, HIS_CONTENTS, REMARK, FILE_ID, REG_ID, USE_YN, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{contractNo}, #{hisDt}, #{historyTypeCd}, #{historySeq}, #{historyContents}, #{remark}, #{fileId}, #{regId}, #{useYn}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TS_MA_HISTORY SET HIS_SEQ = #{historySeq}, HIS_CONTENTS = #{historyContents}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE HIS_ID = #{historyId}
UPDATE TS_MA_HISTORY SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE HIS_ID = #{historyId}
